title: Greenhouse: Weather
description: Tempest station observations + Open-Meteo 16-day forecast. Solid lines = observed, dashed = forecast.

panels.title: Temperature

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Temperature" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Feels Like

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, feels_like_f AS "Feels Like" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND feels_like_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the apparent outdoor temperature after wind and humidity effects are considered.

panels.title: Humidity

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_rh_pct AS "RH" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows humidity behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Dew Point

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, dew_point AS "Dew Point" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND dew_point IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows outdoor dew point, a key driver of indoor humidity potential and disease risk.

panels.title: Wind

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, wind_speed_mph AS "Wind" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND wind_speed_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows outdoor wind speed and direction, which affect ventilation opportunity and drying pressure.

panels.title: Pressure

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, pressure_hpa AS "Pressure" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND pressure_hpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows outdoor barometric pressure from the weather station.

panels.title: UV Index

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, uv_index AS "UV" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND uv_index IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current or recent outdoor UV index.

panels.title: Solar W/m²

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows outdoor solar irradiance, one of the main drivers of greenhouse heat gain.

panels.title: Temperature — Observed vs Forecast
panels.description: Solid = Tempest observed. Dashed = Open-Meteo forecast. Includes feels-like and dew point.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Observed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), temp_f AS "Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT $__time(ts), feels_like_f AS "Feels Like" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND feels_like_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), dew_point AS "Dew Point" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dew_point IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wet_bulb_temp_f AS "Wet Bulb" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wet_bulb_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Soil Temperature (Forecast)
panels.description: Open-Meteo soil surface temp (0cm depth). No local probe yet.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), soil_temp_f AS "Soil Temp" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND soil_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Relative Humidity — Observed vs Forecast

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_rh_pct AS "Observed RH" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), rh_pct AS "Forecast RH" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.description: Shows humidity behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: VPD & Dew Point Spread
panels.description: VPD from forecast + observed dew spread (air temp − dew point). Condensation risk when spread nears 0.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_control AS "VPD (kPa)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_control IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), vpd_kpa AS "VPD Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_kpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT $__time(ts), (outdoor_temp_f - dew_point) AS "Dew Spread Observed (°F)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND dew_point IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), (temp_f - dew_point_f) AS "Dew Spread Forecast (°F)" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_f IS NOT NULL AND dew_point_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Precipitation — Observed & Forecast
panels.description: Observed from Tempest rain gauge. Forecast: probability as area, amount as bars.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), precip_prob_pct AS "Precip Prob (%)" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), rain_in AS "Forecast Rain (in)" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rain_in > 0 ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), snow_in AS "Forecast Snow (in)" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND snow_in > 0 ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT $__time(ts), precip_intensity_in_h AS "Observed (in/hr)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND precip_intensity_in_h IS NOT NULL AND precip_intensity_in_h > 0 ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Evapotranspiration (ET₀)
panels.description: FAO Penman-Monteith reference ET from Open-Meteo. Key for irrigation planning.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), et0_mm AS "ET₀" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND et0_mm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Wind
panels.description: Shows outdoor wind speed and direction, which affect ventilation opportunity and drying pressure.

panels.title: Wind Speed — Observed & Forecast
panels.description: Sustained speed, gusts, and lulls from Tempest. Forecast wind as dashed overlay.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), wind_speed_mph AS "Speed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_speed_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wind_gust_mph AS "Gusts" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_gust_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wind_lull_mph AS "Lulls" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_lull_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), wind_speed_mph AS "Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), wind_gust_mph AS "Forecast Gusts" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_gust_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Wind Direction
panels.description: Compass degrees (0°=N, 90°=E, 180°=S, 270°=W). Points=instantaneous, line=average.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), wind_direction_deg AS "Instantaneous" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_direction_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wind_direction_avg_deg AS "Average" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_direction_avg_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), wind_dir_deg AS "Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Solar Radiation — Observed vs Forecast
panels.description: Tempest irradiance vs Open-Meteo shortwave (total/direct/diffuse split).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Observed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), solar_w_m2 AS "Forecast Total" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), direct_radiation_w_m2 AS "Direct" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND direct_radiation_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), diffuse_radiation_w_m2 AS "Diffuse" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND diffuse_radiation_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: UV Index & Sunshine Duration
panels.description: UV from Tempest + forecast. Sunshine bars show minutes of direct sun per hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), uv_index AS "UV Observed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND uv_index IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), uv_index AS "UV Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND uv_index IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), ROUND(sunshine_duration_s / 60.0) AS "Sunshine (min/hr)" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND sunshine_duration_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Cloud Cover — Total, Low, High
panels.description: Low clouds block more sun; high cirrus less so. Forecast only.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), cloud_cover_pct AS "Total" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), cloud_cover_low_pct AS "Low" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND cloud_cover_low_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), cloud_cover_high_pct AS "High" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND cloud_cover_high_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Illuminance (Outdoor Lux)
panels.description: Tempest ambient light sensor. Total visible light including reflections.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS "Lux" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Solar Position
panels.description: Sun altitude (height above horizon) and azimuth (compass bearing). Explains daily irradiance shape.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS "Altitude" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL AND solar_altitude_deg > 0 ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_azimuth_deg AS "Azimuth" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_azimuth_deg IS NOT NULL AND solar_altitude_deg > 0 ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Barometric Pressure
panels.description: Tempest observed vs forecast surface pressure. Rising = clearing, falling = storms.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), pressure_hpa AS "Observed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND pressure_hpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), surface_pressure_hpa AS "Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND surface_pressure_hpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Air Density & Vapor Pressure
panels.description: Air density affects evaporation and convective heat loss. Vapor pressure = absolute moisture content.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), air_density_kg_m3 AS "Air Density (kg/m³)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND air_density_kg_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), vapor_pressure_inhg AS "Vapor Pressure (inHg)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vapor_pressure_inhg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Visibility (Forecast)
panels.description: Forecast visibility in meters. Affected by fog, precipitation, humidity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), visibility_m AS "Visibility" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND visibility_m IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Lightning Activity
panels.description: Tempest lightning sensor. Count = strikes detected, distance = nearest strike average. Empty = no storms (normal).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), lightning_count AS "Strike Count" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND lightning_count IS NOT NULL AND lightning_count > 0 ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), lightning_avg_dist_mi AS "Avg Distance (mi)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND lightning_avg_dist_mi IS NOT NULL AND lightning_count > 0 ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Weather Code (WMO)
panels.description: 0=Clear, 1-3=Partly cloudy, 45-48=Fog, 51-55=Drizzle, 61-65=Rain, 71-77=Snow, 80-82=Showers, 95-99=Thunderstorm.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), weather_code AS "Weather Code" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND weather_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Temperature Forecast Error
panels.description: Forecast minus actual temp. Positive = forecast too warm. Data grows as accumulation history builds.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(forecast_hour), temp_error_f AS "Temp Error (°F)" FROM v_forecast_accuracy WHERE forecast_hour > now() - interval '7 days' AND temp_error_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY forecast_hour

panels.title: VPD Forecast Error
panels.description: Forecast minus actual VPD. Key metric for greenhouse planning accuracy.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(forecast_hour), vpd_error_kpa AS "VPD Error (kPa)" FROM v_forecast_accuracy WHERE forecast_hour > now() - interval '7 days' AND vpd_error_kpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY forecast_hour
SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(ABS(temp_error_f))::numeric, 1) AS "MAE Temp" FROM v_forecast_accuracy WHERE forecast_hour > now() - interval '7 days' AND temp_error_f IS NOT NULL
SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(ABS(vpd_error_kpa))::numeric, 2) AS "MAE VPD" FROM v_forecast_accuracy WHERE forecast_hour > now() - interval '7 days' AND vpd_error_kpa IS NOT NULL
SELECT NOW() AS time, count(DISTINCT fetched_at) AS "Versions" FROM weather_forecast WHERE fetched_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
SELECT NOW() AS time, count(*) AS "Total Rows" FROM weather_forecast

panels.title: Forecast Bias (7d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, avg_error AS "Bias" FROM fn_forecast_correction('temp_f', 24)

panels.description: Shows forecast data and how it relates to greenhouse conditions.
